name: 0.025% Tretinoin Cream USP
about: 0.025% Tretinoin Cream USP is a highly effective skincare product that is designed to help reduce the appearance of fine lines, wrinkles, and other signs of aging. This cream is formulated with a potent concentration of tretinoin, a derivative of vitamin A, which has been clinically proven to improve skin texture and tone. The cream is easy to use and suitable for all skin types. It comes in a white color and should be stored in a dry place.

faq.q: How does 0.025% Tretinoin Cream USP work?
faq.a: Tretinoin works by increasing cell turnover and stimulating collagen production, which improves skin texture and reduces the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.

faq.q: Is this cream suitable for all skin types?
faq.a: Yes, this cream is suitable for all skin types.

faq.q: How often should I use this cream?
faq.a: The recommended usage is once daily, applied at night before bed.

faq.q: Are there any side effects associated with this cream?
faq.a: Some users may experience mild skin irritation or redness during the first few weeks of use. These side effects typically subside with continued use of the product.

faq.q: Can I wear makeup over this cream?
faq.a: Yes, you can wear makeup over this cream. Just be sure to wait a few minutes after applying the cream to allow it to fully absorb into the skin before applying makeup.
